In Her Own Story

English Eulogy

Birth

Miriam Wacera Mwaura was born in 1926 in Gitugu village, Gitwe sub-location, Ndarugu location, Gatundu south, sub county. She was the fourth born daughter of the late Karanja Njoroge (Miitingi) and the late Wanjiku Karanja. Her siblings were the late Wanjiru Mwaura (Kabaka), the late Nyambura, the late Wageni Ng'ang'a, the late Njoki inooria, Waithira Gakumo and the late Njoroge Karanja (Wagithiga) among other several step sisters and brothers.

Early Life

Miriam Wacera Mwaura grew up assisting her parents in domestic chores, farming among other activities.

Marriage

Miriam met the love of her life the late senior chief Mwaura Munga'ra and were married in accordance with the kikuyu customs. She was the third wife and co wife to the late Elizabeth Gathoni (Ithabethi), the late Rachel Wambui (Rakeri) and Hannah Wambui. They were later blessed with seven children namely, Salome Wanjiru Wambugu, Susan Wanjiku Mwangi, Mary Wanja, Isaac Mung'ara, Margaret Wanjiru Kamuyu, Loise Njeri and Damaris Wageni.

Miriam was a step mother to the late Isaac Mung'ara, Mary Wanjiru Muchai, Mary Njoki Kinuthia, late Ibrahim Mung'ara, Emily Wanjiru Chege, Mary Wanjiru Maingi, Anne Njeri (Nyambura) Njoroge, Ibrahim Mung'ara, Samuel Karanja, Peter Thamara, ruth Wanja Mbugua and john Gichungo.

Miriam was in-law to the late Wambugu Kihumba, Mwangi Njoroge, Elizabeth Nyambura and the late Kamuyu Kamamo.

Education

Miriam did not attend school in her early years. However, in 1979 adult education was introduced by the Kenya government and due to the urge of reading the bible and song book, she seized the opportunity and joined evening classes at Ucheke-ini primary school. Miriam studied very hard and got the basic knowledge which enabled her to read and write. Some of the class mates were her co-wife the late Hannah Wambui Mwaura, the late peris Wangui Ngugi, the late Wambui Hoho, the late Wainaina Chinga and the late Elizabeth Gachambi Kamau.

She excelled very well and was awarded certificates. Miriam had a passion for education and continued until the adult education system was wound up by the government in the 1990's.

Work

Miriam has been a small-scale farmer of which enabled her to educate her children since the husband died in 1969. Due to her hard work and excellency in tea farming, she scooped position two as the best tea farmer in now Theta, Ndarugu and Matara factories.

Church

Miriam was a devoted Christian. She joined the African Inland Mission (AIM) in 1958 at Gachika, now known as Africa Inland Church (AIC). She was baptised in the same church and became a born-again Christian. She was actively involved in various church activities for many years. In 1978, they moved from Gachika AIC and was one of the founding members of AIC Kabuteti. There she served as Sunday school teacher and treasurer for many years. She was also an active member of church women groups, unity of wajane wa Christo and revival group (ya murigo).

Miriam played an active role in the expansion of the church where several out stations were established namely: AIC Gathiru, AIC Ndundu, AIC Theta, AIC Gatundu, AIC Gaitete, AIC Murram, kimunyu and AIC Gathunguri.

Sickness

Miriam enjoyed her good health until the year January 2023, when she started complaining of feeling unwell. She was treated in various hospitals. However, in 2024 she was diagnosed with low blood count (anaemia). She continued receiving treatment at St. Jude hospital, Gatundu, Gatundu level 4 hospital, Nairobi hospital, Thika level five hospital and Nairobi hospice.

Death

In the evening of 1st June 2026, Miriam started vomiting and was rushed to Chaka medical centre, Ndaracha, Murera where she was pronounced dead. Miriam rested peacefully. She died at approximate age of 100 years.

Miriam has left behind 7 children, 22 grandchildren, 18 great grandchildren and several step great great grandchildren.

Nı̈ wa Gĩkũyũ

Kikuyu Eulogy

Guciarwo

Miriam Wacera Mwaura aciarirwo mwaka wa 1926 mũcii-inĩ wa Gitugu, Gitwe sub-location, Ndarugu location, Gatundu South Sub-County. Nĩwe warĩ mwana wa kana wa Karanja Njoroge (Miitingi) na Wanjiku Karanja. Maciaraniirwo na Wanjiru Mwaura (Kabaka), Nyambura, Wageni Ng'ang'a, Njoki Inooria, Waithira Gakumo na Njoroge Karanja (Wagithiga), na aarĩ na aarĩu angĩ a ithe wake.

Ũnyinyi Wake

Miriam Wacera Mwaura akurire arĩ hamwe na aciari ake, agĩteithia wĩra wa mũcii, wĩra wa mũgũnda hamwe na maundu mangi.

Kihiko

Miriam nĩonanire na mwedwa wake mutigaire Senior Chief Mwaura na makihikania kuringana na mitugo ya ugikuyu. Nĩwe warĩ mũtumia wa gatatũ hamwe na atumia arĩa angĩ: Elizabeth Gathoni (Ithabethi), Rachel Wambui (Rakeri) na Hannah Wambui. Magitanahirwo na ciana mũgwanja: Salome Wanjiru Wambugu, Susan Wanjiku Mwangi, Mary Wanja, Isaac Mung'ara, Margaret Wanjiru Kamuyu, Loise Njeri na Damaris Wageni. Miriam ararĩ nyina munini wa Isaac Mung'ara, Mary Wanjiru Muchai, Mary Njoki Kinuthia, Ibrahim Mung'ara, Emily Wanjiru Chege, Mary Wanjiru Maingi, Anne Njeri (Nyambura) Njoroge, Samuel Karanja, Peter Thamara, Ruth Wanja Mbugua na John Gichungo. Ararĩ nyina muthoni wa Wambugu Kihumba, Mwangi Njoroge, Elizabeth Nyambura na Kamuyu Kamamo.

Githomo

Miriam ndathomete arĩ munini, no mwaka wa 1979, rĩrĩa githoomo kia andũ akũrũ kiambĩrĩrio nĩ thirikari ya Kenya, nionire ũhoro ũciu ta mweke wa gũthoma amenye Bibilia na ibuku rĩa nyimbo. Athomeire maya cukuruine ya Ucheke-ini primary school.

Nĩathomire na kĩyo kĩnene, agĩĩkĩra ũmenyo wa mũthingi wa gũthoma na kwandika. Hamwe na andũ arĩa mathomaga nake nĩ Hannah Wambui Mwaura, Peris Wangui Ngugi, Wambui Hoho, Wainaina Chinga na Elizabeth Gachambi Kamau.

Nĩekĩre wega mũno na akĩheeo certificate.

Wĩra

Miriam nĩarĩ mũrimi mũnini wa mĩgũnda, na nĩguo ahotire kũrera na gũthomithia ciana ciake thutha wa gũkũa wa mũthuri wake- mwaka wa 1969. Nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra wake mwega wa kũrĩma macani, nĩaheirwo kĩheo kerĩ ta mũrimi mwega wa macani gatagati ka mafactory ma Theta, Ndarugu na Matara.

Kanitha

Miriam nĩarĩ Mũkristiano mwĩhokeku. Nĩaingerire African Inland Mission (AIM) mwaka wa 1958 kũu Gachika, niyo Africa Inland Church (AIC). Nĩabatithiirio kuo na agĩtũĩka Mũkristiano.

Mwaka wa 1978, nimathamire Gachika AIC. Aarĩ umwe wa andũ aria maambirĩria AIC Kabuteti. Kuo nĩatuikire mũrutani wa Sunday School na mũigi wa mbeca cia kanitha mĩaka mĩingi.

Nĩarĩ mũndũ wa gĩkundi kĩa atumia a kanitha, kĩa wajane na Kristo hamwe na gĩkundi kĩa uhonokio (Murigo).

Miriam nĩateitheriirie mũno gũkũra gwa kanitha, na makiambiriria makanitha maingĩ ta AIC Gathiru, AIC Ndundu, AIC Theta, AIC Gatundu, AIC Gaitete, AIC Murram Kimunyu na AIC Gathunguri.

Nduari

Miriam nĩaikarire na ũgima mwega nginya Mweri wa Mbere mwaka wa 2023. Nĩatwarirwo thibĩtari nyingĩ nĩguo arigitwo. Mwaka wa 2024, nĩamenyekanĩre atĩ arĩ na thakame nini (anaemia).

Agĩthĩĩ na mbere na kũheeo ndawa na kurigitwo St. Jude Hospital Gatundu, Gatundu Level 4 Hospital, Nairobi Hospital, Thika Level Five Hospital hamwe na Nairobi Hospice.

Gikuo

Hwai-inĩ wa 1st June 2026, Miriam niaigwire mwiri uuru na agitengerio Chaka Medical Centre, Ndaracha, Murera kuria ahurukiire. Arahurukire ena ukuru wa miaka 100.

Nĩatiga ciana 7, Tuchuchu 22 na tuchukuru 18, hamwe na andũ angĩ a nyũmba nene. Ni Ngai waheanire Miriam na niwe wamucokera, riitwa riake rigathwo.

Hymns & Worship

Songs

Hymn 185
Gooca Jehova Ngai wa Iguru
1. Gooca Jehova Ngai wa Igũrũ, Na hinya wa ngoro yaku youthe, Na ũmwende mũno na mecĩrĩa maku, Na ũũgĩ wa ngoro yaku youthe. Ndũgetigĩre na ndũkamakio Nĩ hinya na thĩ; Nĩ hinya wa thĩ; Ndũkareke igai rĩtabuthaga. 2. Kũigua maathani, nawe ũkamahingia, Nĩgũkĩrĩte mahaki mothe, Naguo wendani ũgatuĩka igongona, Nacio tha igatoria cĩra wa Ngai. 3. Ndũkanegooce na hinya na mwĩrĩ, Na ndũgakenio nĩ thũmbi ya thĩ; Wakinya Igũrũ thũmbi io nĩ ĩkoma, Na ũtheri wayo ũgatuĩka nduma. 4. Wĩnyihie mũno rĩrĩa wĩ gũkũ thĩ, Wĩrigĩrĩire muoyo wa Jesũ, Na niũkaheo thũmbĩ ya ũthamaki, Ndũrĩri ciothe irũrũnganĩte.
Mar 12:28-34
Hymn 386
Hakuhi Nawe Ngai (Nearer My God to Thee)
1. Hakuhi nawe Ngai, nĩguo ngwenda; Hakuhĩ makĩria, Ngai wakwa: Hingo yakwa youthe njikarage nawe, Hakuhĩ makĩria, Ngai wakwa. 2. Nĩĩ ndĩ mũgendi rũgendo-inĩ; Ndĩrĩ ngahurũka ngoro-inĩ: No rũĩmbo nyinaga uguo ngĩthiaga, Hakuhĩ makĩria, Ngai wakwa. 3. Maũndũ matheru mangucagia; Nĩmo maku mega ma Igũrũ: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndĩ toro ũnjikaragie, Hakuhĩ makĩria, Ngai wakwa. 4. Jesũ, ũndeithagie ngũkumagie; Na matukũ mothe ngũkenagie: Na ndona mathĩna kĩeha, Hakuhĩ makĩria, Ngai wakwa. 5. Rũgendo rũathira rũa gũkũ thĩ; Ũkandwara Igũrũ gwaku mũcĩĩ: Nĩkuo ngakenera tondũ ngaatũũraga, Hakuhĩ makĩria, Ngai wakwa.
Jak 4:8
Song
Mwathani Na Ũtheri Waku Mwega
Mwathani na Ũtheri Waku Mwega ũndongorie Kwĩ na nduma na nĩĩ ndĩ kũraya ũndongorie Mwathani nyita makinya makwa Ingĩenda kuona kũraya nyonia Ndioĩ kana nĩ wega kũhoya ũhoro ũyũ Nĩndendaga kwĩ menyera njĩra na ngethũkia Ndendaga mĩago ya bũrũri-inĩ Ũremi ũcio niũthũkĩtie ma
Hymn 290
Mwona Mathina Kaingi (Oft in Danger, Oft in Woe)
1. Mwona mathĩna kaingi O na ningi mogwati, Inyui Akristiano, Ũmĩrĩriai ngoro. 2. Tigai kũigua kĩeha, Maithori magathira. Tigai gwĩtigĩra; Ngai akamũhe hinya. 3. Rekei ngoro ĩkene, Mũthiage na mbere. Rwai na mũtorie Mehia na ũũru wothe. 4. Athigari a Ngai, Rwai mbaarainĩ; O na mũngĩgerio, Mũtĩkanatorio. 5. Ithe witũ, ũigue Nyĩmbo cia gũkũgatha. Na cia kũgooca Jesũ O na Roho Mũtheru.
Tham 14:10-15
Hymn 238
Ũtugi Wa Magegania (Amazing Grace)
1. Ũtugi wa magegania Nĩwa'honokirie Rĩrĩa ndarĩ mũtumumu, Ngĩhĩngũke maitho. 2. Nĩ ũtugi wanyonirie Gwĩtigĩra Ngai; Ũkĩnina guoya ngoro Rĩrĩa ndetikirĩe. 3. Mogwati nĩ maingĩ mũno, O namo magerio; No ũtugi ũcio wĩkĩ Nĩũkanginyia gwaku. 4. Mwathani nianjirĩire Irathimo nyingĩ; Ndĩĩhokaga kiugo giake Muoyo wakwa wothe. 5. Na ũtugi watũkinyia Nĩtũgakenaga, Tũkũrome Mĩaka ngiri ngiri.
Ef 2:4-9
